title: inga lacustris
intro: Inga lacustris, also known as the lacustrine inga, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Inga lacustris include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Inga lacustris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
